cases.name: colour photo
cases.reason: color content detected — radiographs are grayscale

cases.reason: tonal histogram is too flat for a radiograph (looks like a graphic, document, or screenshot)

cases.name: near-solid
cases.reason: image is nearly uniform — no anatomical content

cases.name: white noise
cases.reason: no chest anatomy detected — the bright central mediastinum column of a chest film is missing

cases.reason: color content detected — radiographs are grayscale
